headline: What Willis Towers Watson (WTW)'s New Digital Infrastructure Protector Launch Means For Shareholders
summary: In early April 2026, Willis, a WTW business, launched Digital Infrastructure Protector, an end-to-end insurance and risk management solution for data center owners, operators, contractors and hyperscalers, offering integrated construction-to-operations coverage with more than US$3.00 billion in capacity in collaboration with Zurich. A distinctive aspect of this offering is WTW’s Global Digital Infrastructure Group, which combines cross-sector experts and analytics-led risk frameworks to...

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Neutral on Willis Towers Watson, Lowers Price Target to $347
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Joshua Shanker   maintains Willis Towers Watson (NASDAQ:WTW) with a Neutral and lowers the price target from $354 to $347.
